external_sources.relevance: Canonical card object fields for oracle_id, legalities, prices, images, all_parts, keywords, produced_mana, rulings_uri, and prints_search_uri.
external_sources.gap: ManaLoom has core card identity and prices, but should keep all_parts/keywords/produced_mana/rulings_uri available for battle and decision trace enrichment.

external_sources.relevance: Atomic cards separate oracle-like data from printing data; leadershipSkills marks formats where a card can be commander.
external_sources.gap: Commander/Brawl eligibility should prefer explicit leadershipSkills/official rule gates over text-only inference when available.

external_sources.relevance: Official commander color identity, 100-card deck shape, command zone, commander tax, and commander damage framing.
external_sources.gap: Keep strict color identity and commander tax/damage as backend-owned validation; do not outsource this to Hermes SQLite.

external_sources.relevance: Legendary Vehicles and Spacecraft with printed power/toughness can be commanders; Spacecraft/Station/Warp must be modeled deliberately.
external_sources.gap: Battle/Commander legality should retain backlog coverage for Vehicle/Spacecraft commander, Station, Warp, Void, and Lander signals.

external_sources.relevance: Metrics like OH WR, GIH WR, GP WR, IWD, ALSA, and ATA show how to avoid overtrusting raw win rate.
external_sources.gap: Use methodology for Hermes scorecards only; do not import 17Lands card performance into Commander recommendations.

recommendations.title: Maintain card_intelligence_snapshot anti-fanout guardrail
recommendations.reason: Direct joins from deck_cards to card_battle_rules multiply deck rows.
recommendations.action: Keep product consumers on card_intelligence_snapshot or equivalent per-card aggregation; do not replace this with direct deck_cards -> card_battle_rules joins.

recommendations.title: Keep null-owner PG registered decks out of product cleanup
recommendations.reason: All null-owner decks match private complete PG registered Commander lab variants.
recommendations.action: Do not delete automatically. Assign an owner only through an explicit PostgreSQL package if these variants need product visibility.

recommendations.title: Adopt commander_learning_snapshot in future learning loaders
recommendations.reason: The backend-owned commander learning aggregate exists; new consumers should not reassemble Hermes/usage/synergy lineage ad hoc.
recommendations.action: Route future learned-deck diagnostics and optimizer learning reads through commander_learning_snapshot while keeping raw Hermes metadata hidden from normal users.

recommendations.title: Add decision-impact metrics inspired by 17Lands methodology
recommendations.reason: Raw Lorehold WR is not enough to trust deck or battle improvements.
recommendations.action: Track with/without-seen/cast deltas, sample size, baseline hash, and opponent archetype; do not import 17Lands Commander recommendations.
